product: Standard performance mode is now supported for materialized view or streaming ta
tagline: July 6, 2026 Materialized view and streaming table refreshes that are orchestrated through a [SQL task](/aws/en/ldp/dbsql/schedule refreshes sql task) in a Lakeflow job now respect the job's Performan
what_it_does: July 6, 2026 Materialized view and streaming table refreshes that are orchestrated through a [SQL task](/aws/en/ldp/dbsql/schedule refreshes sql task) in a Lakeflow job now respect the job's Performance optimized setting. When the setting is turned off, the refresh uses standard performance mode, which consumes fewer DBUs.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
